findings.couldEndEarlierAt: The contamination pressed at her sternum, copper and turned earth in her throat, wrongness humming under the packed dirt hard enough to make her hands want to shake. She had been reading it through glass.

findings.line: The corruption had crossed from line to land.

findings.couldEndEarlierAt: It was in the dirt, in the water feeding the fields, in whatever roots still dared drink here.

findings.line: the emptied stillness of places where people had stopped coming out long before sunset
findings.missingPayload: A visible carrier showing exactly how Jaina knows the farms were abandoned before sunset rather than simply shut and smokeless at dusk.
findings.suggestedFix: Farm after farm sat with its doors shut and no smoke rising.

findings.line: stillness where evening life should have been
findings.missingPayload: The visible village activity the phrase is gesturing at; the line names an absence in mood terms instead of giving a concrete, on-page sign.
